text:
どうもありがとう！
でも、きみに特訓してもらうなんて
なんだかやっぱりヘンな感じ。

って、帰還した途端に先輩っぽく
なっちゃうのもカッコ悪いかな？

こんなとこゼノに見られたら笑われそう
だけど、いい訓練ができてよかった。

また機会があれば、あたしの特訓に
付き合ってちょう

Thanks for that. I've got to say though, it
does feel weird to be asking you to help me
train, and not the other way around.

I must sound so lame, acting like I outrank you
and stuff the second we get back.

I bet Zeno would have laughed my ears straight
off if he saw us out there, but it was exactly
the training I needed.

I hope you don't mind lending me a hand again
sometime if you get the chance.
